title: Trophaeum elegans
taxonomy: Trophaeum elegans is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as Thailand and Myanmar. The classification of Trophaeum elegans is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, the clade Eudicots, the clade Asterids, and the family Gentianaceae. Within the family Gentianaceae, it is placed in the genus Trophaeum. The exact classification of Trophaeum elegans is Trophaeum elegans (Gagnep.) Airy Shaw.
